productDisplayName: Fila Men Black Supercharger Sports Shoes
description: Style Notefila fan boys will surely love this aggressive sport shoe from the Italian brand, with its mesh upper, cushiony midsole and comfy padded inner. The DLS Supercharger is desgined to keep your feet cushioned and comfy, regardless of the terrain. This shoe is great for a morning jog or a weekend game!Product DetailsBlack shoe with mesh upper, central lace-ups, synthetic overlays and brandingHighly meshed and padded tongue and innerCompression moulded midsole for maximum cushioning in the heel and forefootLightweight hard rubber outsole with waffle and cross patterned lugs Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
